mapper.select: select id, article_id, summary_json, keywords_json, why_important, impact_scope, model_name, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time from tech_briefing_article_ai where article_id = #{articleId} limit 1

select id, article_id, summary_json, keywords_json, why_important, impact_scope, model_name, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time from tech_briefing_article_ai where article_id in
#{articleId}
mapper.update: update tech_briefing_article_ai set summary_json = #{summaryJson}, keywords_json = #{keywordsJson}, why_important = #{whyImportant}, impact_scope = #{impactScope}, model_name = #{modelName}, status = #{status}, fail_reason = #{failReason} where article_id = #{articleId}
